name: Hawaiian Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, thoroughly mash the bananas and set aside.
3. In another mixing bowl, mix together the sugar and oil and blend thoroughly.
4. Add the mashed bananas and eggs to the mixture, then mix until combined.
5. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, salt, and baking soda).
6. Stir the sifted dry ingredients into the banana mixture until the flour is moistened.
7. Pour the batter into a loaf pan that has been lined with wax paper on the bottom and well greased.
8. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, testing for doneness.
